headline: NVR: Fundamental Resilience And Reasonable Valuation Warrant A Buy Amid Market Volatility
summary: NVR, Inc. demonstrates resilience amid soft housing markets, leveraging an asset-light model. Read what suggests a Buy rating for NVR stock.
